memberdef.name: EMACPS_PHY_DELAY_SEC
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* Amount of time to delay waiting on PHY to reset */

briefdescription.para: Set the MAC addresses in the frame.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the frame.

briefdescription.para: Set the frame type for the specified frame.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the frame.
is the Type to set in frame.

briefdescription.para: This function places a pattern in the payload section of a frame.

detaileddescription.para: The pattern is a 8 bit incrementing series of numbers starting with 0. Once the pattern reaches 256, then the pattern changes to a 16 bit incrementing pattern: 0, 1, 2, ... 254, 255, 00, 00, 00, 01, 00, 02, ...

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the frame to change.
is the number of bytes in the payload that will be set.

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the frame data against a CheckFrame.

detaileddescription.para: Validation occurs by comparing the ActualFrame to the header of the CheckFrame. If the headers match, then the payload of ActualFrame is verified for the same pattern Util_FrameSetPayloadData() generates.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to a frame containing the 14 byte header that should be present in the ActualFrame parameter.
is a pointer to a frame to validate.

briefdescription.para: This function sets all bytes of a frame to 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the frame itself.

briefdescription.para: This function copies data from source to destination for n bytes.

parameterdescription.para: is the targeted string to copy to.
is the source string to copy from.
is number of bytes to be copied.

simplesect.para: This function is similar to strncpy(), however strncpy will stop either at null byte or n bytes is been copied. This function will copy n bytes without checking the content.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by example code when an error is detected.

detaileddescription.para: It can be set as a breakpoint with a debugger or it can be used to print out the given message if there is a UART or STDIO device.

parameterdescription.para: is the text explaining the error

briefdescription.para: This function provides delays in seconds.

simplesect.para: for microblaze the delay is not accurate and it need to tuned.

briefdescription.para: Defines common data types, prototypes, and includes the proper headers for use with the EMACPS example code residing in this directory.

detaileddescription.para: This file along with xemacps_example_util.c are utilized with the specific example code in the other source code files provided. These examples are designed to be compiled and utilized within the SDK standalone BSP development environment.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a wsy 01/10/10 First release 1.01a asa 02/27/12 Hash define added for EMACPS_SLCR_DIV_MASK. 1.05a asa 09/22/13 The EthernetFrame is made cache line aligned (32 bytes). Fix for CR #663885. 3.0 hk 02/20/15 Increase array sizes to add support for jumbo frames. 3.2 mus 02//16 Added support support to INTC controller 3.3 kpc 12/09/16 Fixed issue when -O2 is enabled 3.9 hk 01/23/19 Update versal emulation specific fixes. 03/20/19 Fix alignment pragmas for IAR compiler.
